description: bhagavadgita.io publishes the text of the Bhagavad Gita online with chapter and verse browsing, translations, and related reading features. It also provides an API for developers to access that content programmatically.
summary: bhagavadgita.io exposes one documented REST API for Bhagavad Gita chapters and verses, with OpenAPI documents available and an access token passed as a query parameter.
